title: breweria pickeringii
intro: Breweria pickeringii, also known as the "devil's claw" vine or simply devil's claw, is a perennial climber native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant contains various alkaloids, including harpagoside, which is responsible for its medicinal properties, having anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. Breweria pickeringii is used to treat various health issues, including arthritis, fibromyalgia, and other conditions associated with joint pain and inflammation, and it may also help to reduce stress and anxiety levels. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the dried roots and stems in hot water, or by using the plant's extracts as dietary supplements.
